parameters.query:
-- Get all processed sales from the last hour that haven't been notified
SELECT 
  eo.id as event_outbox_id,
  eo.reference_id,
  eo.created_at as event_created_at,
  eo.payload,
  ps.id as sale_id,
  ps.sale_number,
  ps.sale_status,
  ps.payment_method,
  ps.total_amount,
  ps."createdAt" as sale_created_at
FROM event_outbox eo
INNER JOIN pos_sale ps ON ps.id = eo.reference_id
WHERE eo.event_type = 'POS_SALE'
  AND eo.event_status = 'PROCESSED'
  AND eo.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND (eo.notified_at IS NULL OR eo.notified_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')
ORDER BY eo.created_at ASC;

-- Get detailed sale items with package descriptions
SELECT 
  psi.id as sale_item_id,
  psi.sale_id,
  psi.package_id,
  psi.inventory_id,
  psi.brand_name,
  psi.generic_name,
  psi.quantity,
  psi.unit_price,
  psi.total_price,
  np.description as package_description,
  np.package_ndc,
  i.quantity_on_hand,
  i.lot_number,
  i.expiry_date,
  ps.sale_number,
  ps.sale_status,
  ps.payment_method,
  ps.total_amount as sale_total_amount,
  ps."createdAt" as sale_time
FROM pos_sale_item psi
INNER JOIN pos_sale ps ON ps.id = psi.sale_id
INNER JOIN ndc_package np ON np.id = psi.package_id
LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.id = psi.inventory_id
WHERE psi.sale_id = ANY(
  SELECT ps2.id 
  FROM event_outbox eo2
  INNER JOIN pos_sale ps2 ON ps2.id = eo2.reference_id
  WHERE eo2.event_type = 'POS_SALE'
    AND eo2.event_status = 'PROCESSED'
    AND eo2.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND (eo2.notified_at IS NULL OR eo2.notified_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')
)
ORDER BY ps."createdAt" ASC, psi.id ASC;

nodes.name: Fetch Sale Items with Package Details

parameters.query:
-- Mark sales as notified
UPDATE event_outbox
SET notified_at = NOW()
WHERE event_type = 'POS_SALE'
  AND event_status = 'PROCESSED'
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND (notified_at IS NULL OR notified_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour');
